samples.title: Detailed Butter Chicken
steps: Cover with 1,2" water over the chicken
When the chicken is tender, take it out, take it out and allow the chicken and water to dry
Mash the garlic. Finely chop the rice
Put it in with a lid except the rice
the heat and cook for 15-20 hours or until the chicken is done
samples.formatted:
Detailed Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- boneless chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- black pepper
- cilantro
- cooked rice

Instructions:
1. Cover with 1,2" water over the chicken
2. When the chicken is tender, take it out, take it out and allow the chicken and water to dry
3. Melt the butter
4. Mash the garlic. Finely chop the rice
5. Put it in with a lid except the rice
6. Bring to a boil
7. the heat and cook for 15-20 hours or until the chicken is done
8. Mix well
9. Serve with rice
